decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28. The listkit transforms, the return-new-list convention, and the move_to_front rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: move_to_front returns the elements with value at the front and the others in their original relative order, and returns an equivalent list (not an error) when value is absent.
The change modifies only the listkit module and adds no new third-party dependency.

weighted.criterion: It does NOT mutate its input argument — the caller's list is unchanged after the call, consistent with dedupe and without returning new lists.
It returns a newly constructed list rather than the mutated input.
